listitem.para: Input image. Color images are converted to uint8 grayscale internally.
AKAZE keypoint object containing coordinates, scale, orientation, and response fields.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Detects AKAZE keypoints with OpenCV. AKAZE is an accelerated variant of the KAZE nonlinear scale-space detector.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.

refsection.title: Bibliography
refsection.para: OpenCV AKAZE local feature matching tutorial.
